actual_current_surface_status: bounded-support / scalar source response harness extension
proposal_allowed_reason: The harness extracts dE/ds only; kappa_s and production response data remain open.
required_next_steps: run source-response shifts on production gauge ensembles
derive scalar source-to-canonical-Higgs normalization kappa_s from LSZ/canonical kinetic data
derive any lattice-to-SM response matching rather than setting Z_match = 1

analysis.source_coordinate: uniform additive lattice scalar source s entering the Dirac mass as m_bare + s
analysis.strict_limit: dE/ds is not dE/dh until kappa_s is derived by scalar LSZ/canonical normalization

source_response_metadata.source_coordinate: uniform additive lattice scalar source s entering the Dirac mass as m_bare + s

strict_non_claims: does not use H_unit matrix-element readout
does not use yt_ward_identity as y_t authority
does not use observed top mass or observed y_t as proof selectors
does not set kappa_s, c2, or Z_match to one
verdict: The direct-correlator production harness now supports explicit uniform scalar-source shifts and emits a dE/ds response analysis. This materially advances the Feynman-Hellmann measurement route: the observable can be generated by the same harness rather than only by a synthetic scout.  It is not retained closure because the source coordinate is the lattice source s, not the canonical Higgs fluctuation h; kappa_s and any lattice-to-SM matching remain open imports.
